theorem:  mergesort_sorted
sample:   1
attempt:  fix_3

[proof]
simpa using sorted_mergesort (T := T) l

[lean error]
location:
    theorem eval_mergesort_sorted [Preorder T] [DecidableRel (LT.lt (α := T))] (l : List T) : Sorted (mergesort l) := by
      simpa using sorted_mergesort (T := T) l
                 ^
